notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the openssl SRPM in CIQ FIPS Compliant for Rocky Linux 8. It addresses 27 CVEs: CVE-2006-2937, CVE-2006-2940, CVE-2006-3738, CVE-2006-4339, CVE-2006-4343, and 22 more.
